stemHtml: An aircraft climbs below the tropopause at constant Indicated Airspeed. What would be the most likely cause for aircraft buffet?

options.a: High Angle of Attack due to the increase in TAS.
options.b: High Angle of Attack due to the decrease in TAS.
options.c: High Mach Number due to the increase in TAS.
options.d: High Mach Number due to the increase in LSS.
